title: Fiscal Year 2025 Veterans Affairs Major Medical Facility Authorization Act
short_title: Fiscal Year 2025 Veterans Affairs Major Medical Facility Authorization Act
stage_label: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Veterans' Affairs.
crs_summary: Fiscal Year 2025 Veterans Affairs Major Medical Facility Authorization Act This bill authorizes the Department of Veterans Affairs to carry out specified major medical facility projects during FY2025. The bill also indicates the maximum amount that may be spent on each project.
last_action_text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Veterans' Affairs.
